case_title: ALICIA MERO VS. A&A AUTO PARTS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED SEP-02-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT A&A AUTO PARTS
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERO, ALICIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT A&A AUTO PARTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
